sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try clicking the blue circle repeatedly
for i in range(5):
    action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 27, 'col': 33}])
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    nodes = seg['nodes']
    for n in nodes:
        if n['color'] == 'M':
            b = n['boundary']
            cr = sum(p[0] for p in b)/len(b)
            cc = sum(p[1] for p in b)/len(b)
            print(f"Click {i+1}: M dot at ({int(cr)}, {int(cc)})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
